svg.text: How data comes in, becomes a graph, and is served
Two ingestion paths → one knowledge graph → served over SQL and MCP
reads the warehouse in place — zero copy
joins federated + raw/enrichment → materialized into CLEAN (roadmap)
· who can see what, extracted from BOTH paths (ADR-019)
the same Postgres as the catalog
applies acl_allow / acl_deny to CLEAN — on every sync
